documents.title: Welcome to Markdown Editor
documents.content:
# Welcome to Markdown Editor!

This is a **live preview** markdown editor. Start typing on the left, and see the rendered HTML on the right.

## Features

- Real-time preview
- Dark/Light theme toggle
- Toolbar for quick formatting
- Export as .md file
- Save documents

## Markdown Examples

### Text Formatting

You can write **bold text**, *italic text*, or ~~strikethrough~~.

### Code

Inline `code` looks like this.

```
// Code blocks too!
function hello() {
  console.log('Hello World');
}
```

### Links and Images

[Visit Example](https://example.com)

> This is a blockquote. It stands out from the regular text.

---

Enjoy writing!
